---
title: "Guozheng"
listing:
  - id: posts
    contents: "{en,cn}/**/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, date, title]
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 3
  - id: posts-en
    contents: posts/en/**/*/index.qmd
    type: default
    fields: [image, date, title]
    sort: "date desc"
    #categories: cloud
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 3
  - id: posts-cn
    contents: posts/cn/**/*/index.qmd
    type: default
    fields: [image, date, title]
    sort: "date desc"
    #categories: cloud
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 3
  - id: movie
    contents: movie/**/*/index.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 3
date-format: iso
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
toc: true
---

## Recent posts

::: {#posts}
:::

<a href="../posts/index.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary float-end btn-sm">See all</button></a>

## English Posts

::: {#posts-en}
:::

## 中文博客

::: {#posts-cn}
:::

## Recent movies

::: {#movie}
:::

<a href="../movie/index.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary float-end btn-sm">See all</button></a>
